name: @radzor/user-segmentation
description: Segment users based on attributes and behavioral rules. Define segments with filter expressions, evaluate users against them, and list matching segments. In-memory rule engine, zero dependencies.

inputs.name: segments
inputs.description: Pre-defined segment definitions with filter rules.

outputs.name: segmentResult
outputs.description: Result of evaluating a user against segments.

fields.name: matchedSegments
fields.description: IDs of segments the user belongs to.

actions.name: evaluate

params.name: attributes
params.description: User attributes to evaluate against segment rules.

actions.description: Evaluate which segments a user belongs to based on their attributes.

actions.name: defineSegment
actions.description: Define a new segment with filter rules.

actions.name: getUserSegments

params.name: userId
params.description: User to look up cached segments for.

actions.description: Get the cached list of segment IDs for a previously evaluated user.

llm.constraints: Rules are evaluated synchronously in-memory. The cache stores the last evaluation per user — calling evaluate() overwrites the previous result. Supported operators: eq, neq, gt, gte, lt, lte, in, notIn, contains, startsWith, endsWith, exists, regex.
